description: AI music studio — create songs, remix, stem separation, LoRA training
fullDescription:
SunoAce is a self-hosted AI music studio powered by ACE-Step 1.5. Generate full songs from text descriptions, train custom styles with LoRA, and remix existing tracks.

## Features
### Music Generation
- **Simple Mode**: Describe your song, pick genres, and generate — AI handles lyrics, style, and production
- **Custom Mode**: Full control over lyrics, style, BPM, key, time signature, vocal language and gender
- **Multiple DiT Models**: Switch between turbo (fast), base (quality), SFT (prompt-following) models

### Lyrics & Style
- **AI Lyrics Writer**: Llama Song Stream 3B generates structured lyrics
- **Style Generator**: Creates detailed Suno-like production descriptions
- **40+ Languages**: Generate vocals in any supported language

### Audio Tools
- **Cover / Remix**: Upload source audio and recreate in a new style
- **Reference Audio**: Style-match generation inspired by reference tracks
- **Audio Analysis**: Auto-detect BPM, key, genre, lyrics from any audio

### LoRA Training
- **5-Step Wizard**: Upload → Label → Preprocess → Train → Export
- **Auto-Labeling**: AI analyzes your audio samples
- **Custom Styles**: Train on 10-50 songs to capture any style

### GPU Management
- **Lazy Loading**: Models load on demand, freeing VRAM when idle
- **Auto-Unload**: Configurable idle timeout to free GPU memory
name: sunoace
title: SunoAce
